problem id: 236034b4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) XOR NOT SHL(1)) OR SHR(6)

examples:
  00011111 -> 00100010
  10000110 -> 00100011
  00001001 -> 11001100
  01101010 -> 01100111
  01110110 -> 11011101
  11001001 -> 01010111
  01011010 -> 00000001

query: 11100000
predicted answer: 00100011
